testcase.failure:
Tests\Integration\SubscriptionEnforcementTest::test_store_without_ai_assistant_feature_gets_403_feature_locked Unable to find JSON:
[{ "success": false, "error_code": "SUBSCRIPTION_FEATURE_LOCKED" }]
within response JSON:
[{ "success": false, "message": "api.subscription.limit_reached", "error_code": "SUBSCRIPTION_LIMIT_REACHED" }].
